testcase.name: TC10_modifierAdministrateurEcole
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //span[contains(@class,'fi-sidebar-item-label') and normalize-space()='Schools'] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//span[contains(@class,'fi-sidebar-item-label') and normalize-space()='Schools']"}.
